Off Calendar Jul-29-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT DAP, INC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION

Appearances:
Kathleen Chio of Brent Coon & Associates (489.7420) for plaintiff and responding party
Ana Portillo of Jackson & Wallace (982.6300) for defendant and moving party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: the motion is denied. Plaintiff has testified to using defendant's product as far back as 1977 (Depo. 756). Defendant acknowledges certain of its products contained asbestos. The Reid declaration refers to wet and gooey formulations as possibly containing asbestos and plaintiff's interrogatory answers describe the product in that manner. Assuming the burden has shifted, plaintiff's declaration is not subject to a motion to strike under D'Amico and creates a triable issue of fact. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
